reviews.comment:
El Serviclub cerrado por reformas (diciembre 2021) no se puede pagar con la App de YPF ni aceptan AmEx, ni te cargan los puntos serviclub, todo mal

(Translated by Google)
The Serviclub is closed for renovations (December 2021). You can't pay with the YPF app, they don't accept AmEx, and they don't credit your Serviclub points. Everything is wrong.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHcDlLYTlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención de los playeros. Tienen habilitado la.mitad de los surtidores. Los baños estaban muy limpios. Funcionaba el chequeo y carga de aire a neumáticos.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendants were very helpful. Half of the pumps were working. The restrooms were very clean. The tire pressure check and inflation system was functioning.
